message:
✨ Integrate persistence into Deploy dashboard cards (#633)

When CRD-based persistence is enabled:
- ClusterGroups card now stores groups as ClusterGroup CRs
- Deploy drag-and-drop creates ManagedWorkload and WorkloadDeployment CRs
- Visual "CR" badge shows when groups are persisted

Features:
- useClusterGroups hook automatically uses CRs or localStorage based on
  persistence config
- Convert between local ClusterGroup type and CR format seamlessly
- Deploy.tsx creates CRs when workloads are dragged to cluster groups
- ClusterGroups card shows green "CR" badge when persistence is active

This enables kubectl interaction with cluster groups:
  kubectl get clustergroups -n kubestellar-console

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
